title: Palladium feature common fragments
description: Shared JSON Schema fragments for magic, psionic, talent, and other Feature composer catalog rows. Referenced via `$ref` from domain schemas (e.g. `resolutionTable`, `materialRequirements`, `forgedItemOutput`, `spawnedPresence`, `formTransformation`, `castingTargetPreconditions`, `graftProfile`, `cognitiveOverride`, `selfStorage`, `casterAlignmentRestrictions`, `statAdjustment`, `globalSkillModifier`, `damageReflection`, `damageProgression`, `personalityOverride`, `alarmTrigger`, `effectUpkeep`).

percentileRange.description: Inclusive d100 band (01 = 1, 00 = 100). Matches morphus `percentileRange` convention.

min.description: Inclusive low bound on a d100 (01 = 1).

max.description: Inclusive high bound on a d100 (00 = 100).

resolutionTableEntry.description: One outcome band in a percentile or dice resolution table. Provide structured `percentile` for machine resolution or legacy `rollRange` prose for authoring.

rollRange.description: Authoring shorthand for an outcome band (e.g. `01-20`, `77-00`).

label.description: Short outcome label shown in UI (e.g. On target, Off course).

effect.description: Mechanical or narrative outcome when the roll falls within the band.

resolutionTrigger.description: When a resolution table is rolled relative to the spell or power lifecycle.

when.description: `per_melee_round` — roll each melee round while the effect persists (e.g. cumulative escape hazard).

rollKind.description: Dice used when `when` fires; may duplicate table-level `rollKind`.

resolutionTable.description: Percentile or dice outcome bands mapped to mechanical effects (e.g. Teleport arrival accuracy, Exorcism sub-outcomes).

rollKind.description: Primary dice for table resolution when not implied by `resolutionTrigger`.

label.description: Table heading shown at cast or resolution time.

catalogEntityRef.description: Reference to a race/NPC catalog row (`palladium-race.schema.json`, typically `raceAudience: npc`).

catalogItemRef.description: Reference to an equipment/loot catalog row (future `palladium-item.schema.json`).

catalogItemId.description: Canonical item id from `content/items/*.json` when the loot catalog exists.

quantitySpec.description: Structured amount for material components, forged item counts, or charges.

formula.description: Palladium dice or prose formula when `kind` is `formula` or `per_level`.

materialComponentEntry.description: One physical inventory or prose reagent required to cast or complete a ritual.

label.description: Display label when no catalog row exists yet.

unit.description: Inventory unit for the reagent. `item`, `kit`, and `pouch` cover prose ritual components without a catalog row.

consumption.description: `destroyed` deducts from inventory on success; `reusable_tool` must be present but is not consumed.

materialRequirements.description: Physical components consumed or required present for casting (distinct from `ppe` and `permanentCosts`).

label.description: Checklist heading shown before cast or ritual start.

allRequired.description: When true (default), every entry must be satisfied; when false, GM adjudicates partial sets.

forgedItemOutput.description: Persistent equippable item created by enchanting or scroll/scribing rituals.

catalogItemId.description: Loot/equipment catalog row cloned into inventory on success.

outputTemplateId.description: Lightweight template when no catalog row exists yet.

label.description: Display name when forging from a template only.

initialPresence.description: Inventory presence state when the item is created.

bindToCaster.description: When true, only the caster (or designated owner) can use the item.

encodedSpellId.description: For scrolls and similar items — spell invoked when the item is used.

statAdjustment.description: Structured adjustment to an attribute or combat value while an effect is active — flat delta, dice formula, fraction of current maximum, multiplier, or absolute override (e.g. Superhuman Speed locks Spd. to 44). Mirrors `permanentPoolReduction` math but for temporary inflicted/granted modifiers.

kind.description: `fixed` — add/subtract delta; `formula` — dice or attribute expression; `fraction` — numerator/denominator of current value; `multiplier` — scale current value; `override` — replace with absolute locked value regardless of base.

value.description: Flat delta when `kind` is `fixed`; multiplier when `kind` is `multiplier` (e.g. `0.5` halves the attribute); absolute locked value when `kind` is `override` (e.g. `44` for incredible speed).

formula.description: Palladium dice or attribute formula when `kind` is `formula`.

rounding.description: How to round fractional results when applying multipliers or fractions.

attributeStatAdjustment.description: Integer shorthand (`-3`) or structured `statAdjustment` for one attribute key.

statAdjustmentMap.description: Per-attribute adjustments applied while an effect is active. Scope keys (`physical_attributes`, `mental_attributes`) apply one adjustment to every attribute in that scope.

globalSkillModifier.description: Flat percentile adjustment applied to every existing skill on the affected character while the effect is active (e.g. Sickness −40%, Luck Curse −15%). Distinct from `grantedSkills`, which add new temporary proficiencies.

value.description: Signed percentage delta applied to all skill proficiencies (e.g. `-40` reduces skills by 40%, `15` grants +15%).

notes.description: Exceptions or stacking rules (e.g. excludes combat bonuses, does not affect skills below 5%).

damageReflection.description: Retribution or thorns mechanics — damage taken by the protected subject is mirrored back to the attacker (e.g. Ritual: An Eye for an Eye).

reflectionFraction.description: Fraction of incoming qualifying damage reflected to the attacker (e.g. `1.0` for identical wounds, `0.5` for half).

notes.description: Pool or scaling restrictions (e.g. only S.D.C. and Hit Point damage, not M.D.C.).

damageProgression.description: Escalating damage over time — geometric doubling (Fatal Growth: 1D6, 2D6, 4D6…), linear additive ticks, or custom cadence. Combat trackers resolve `baseFormula` on tick 1 then apply `kind` rules each `tickInterval`.

kind.description: `geometric` — multiply the dice pool by `multiplierPerTick` each tick (e.g. ×2); `linear` / `additive` — add `addPerTick` each tick; `custom` — engine defers to `notes`.

baseFormula.description: Damage dice or formula on the first tick (e.g. `1D6` for Fatal Growth round 1).

multiplierPerTick.description: Required when `kind` is `geometric` — factor applied to the dice pool each tick (e.g. `2` doubles: 1D6 → 2D6 → 4D6).

addPerTick.description: Required when `kind` is `linear` or `additive` — extra dice or flat damage appended each tick (e.g. `1D6`, `+2`).

tickInterval.description: How often the damage track advances while the effect persists.

startingTick.description: First tick index (default 1). Use when damage does not begin until a delay.

maxTicks.description: Optional cap on escalation ticks when the book specifies a ceiling.

terminatesWhen.description: `death` — track runs until the victim dies (Fatal Growth); `duration_end` — stops when parent duration expires.

notes.description: Non-automatable cadence or pool rules when `kind` is `custom`.

personalityOverride.description: Sheet-level alignment and insanity transformations inflicted on a target (e.g. Someone Makes Them — permanent alignment shift, implant or remove insanities). Distinct from temporary `statusEffects` tags.

alignment.description: Explicit Palladium alignment applied to the target when `alignmentMode` is `set`.

alignmentMode.description: `set` — replace with `alignment`; `shift_category` — move one step on the good/selfish/evil axis per `notes`; `restore_original` — revert a prior magical alignment change.

insanitiesAdded.description: Insanity or neurosis ids/tags implanted on the target (e.g. `obsession`, `phobia_silver`).

insanitiesRemoved.description: Insanities or neuroses stripped from the target by the effect.

permanent.description: When true (default for Someone Makes Them), changes persist after the spell duration ends.

notes.description: Prose qualifiers (e.g. `any evil alignment`, obsession must involve the caster).

alarmTriggerCondition.description: One environmental predicate that can fire a dormant ward or watching enchantment.

kind.description: What the ward listens for (e.g. `supernatural` — supernatural beings enter range).

proximityFeet.description: Detection radius for this condition (e.g. `1000` or `100 feet per level`).

proximityPerLevel.description: Scaling prose when radius grows with caster level.

alarmTriggerResponse.description: What happens when an `alarmTrigger` condition is satisfied.

alertTarget.description: Who receives the alarm when conditions are met.

summary.description: Player-facing outcome prose for the trigger.

alarmTrigger.description: Dormant ward or watching enchantment — sits idle until `conditions` are met, then fires `onTrigger` (e.g. Watching Enchantment alerts the caster when supernatural beings approach within 1000 ft). Distinct from active `reveals` scanning.

summary.description: Short ward label shown on the caster sheet while the enchantment is active.

satisfy.description: `any_condition` (default) — one predicate fires the alarm; `all_conditions` — every predicate must be true.

targetConditionState.description: Observable target state checked before surgical or consent-sensitive magic is applied.

graftMode.description: Fleshsculptor graft or transplant delivery mode (e.g. Meld Living Flesh & Bone use cases).

graftDonorRequirement.description: Donor tissue constraints for mystical grafts and transplants.

sameSpeciesRequired.description: When true, donor and recipient must be the same species (Replace Limb pattern).

supernaturalToMortalForbidden.description: When true, supernatural donor tissue cannot be grafted onto a mortal recipient.

supernaturalToSupernaturalAllowed.description: When true, supernatural-to-supernatural grafts are permitted where the book allows them.

tissueMaxAgeHours.description: Maximum post-mortem age of donor tissue still eligible for grafting (e.g. 3 hours for Meld).

acceptLivingOrFreshDead.description: When true, donor tissue may be living or freshly deceased within `tissueMaxAgeHours`.

preserveMagicAccepted.description: When true, magically preserved tissue qualifies even when not freshly harvested.

donorAppearanceRetained.description: When true, the graft retains the donor's visible appearance (skin, limb, head).

behavioralBleedThrough.description: When true, donor instincts or mannerisms may influence the recipient.

extraAppendagesAllowed.description: When true, the spell may add non-symmetrical appendages rather than only replace missing parts.

headTransplantWindowMinutes.description: Minutes after decapitation within which a head transplant remains viable (e.g. 20 for Meld).

graftProfile.description: Structured donor, species, and appearance rules for Fleshsculptor grafts and transplants (Replace Limb, Meld, Total Replacement).

modes.description: Supported graft delivery modes exposed as cast-time or profile choices.

retainsDonorPowers.description: When true, animal or supernatural donor powers may persist on the grafted tissue.

appearanceMismatch.description: When true, the recipient's overall appearance may not match the grafted part.

cognitiveOverride.description: Deep cognitive surgery — Mindsculpt memory, skill, and loyalty rewriting beyond `personalityOverride` alignment/insanity shifts.

iqFloor.description: Minimum I.Q. the victim retains after the procedure (Mindsculpt floor of 1).

skillsRemoved.description: `all` or explicit skill ids/names stripped from the victim.

knowledgeCategoriesRemoved.description: Broad knowledge domains erased (e.g. history, spell lore, streetwise).

mentalAbilitiesRemoved.description: `memory_selective_edit` — victim cannot selectively edit implanted memories.

loyaltyBinding.description: Implanted obedience or goal structure binding the victim to the caster.

memoryErasureMinWeeks.description: Minimum retroactive memory span erased (fixed weeks or dice formula).

cannotIncreaseIqOrSkills.description: When true, the procedure cannot raise I.Q. or add skills — only reduce or replace.

deathAvoidanceSave.description: Ritual death-risk check before Mindsculpt completes (roll under P.E. on D20).

selfStorage.description: Internal object inventory held inside the caster's body (Absorb Object).

maxTotalWeightLbs.description: Combined weight cap for all stored objects (e.g. 12 lbs).

maxSingleObjectWeightLbs.description: Per-object weight cap when the book limits individual items separately.

range.description: Storage applies only to the caster's own body.

disgorgementMeleeRounds.description: Melee rounds required to expel one stored object.

disgorgementPpeCost.description: P.P.E. spent to disgorge a stored object (0 when free).

internalAttackDamageMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to damage dealt to stored objects from internal attacks (e.g. 3×).

livingCreaturesAllowed.description: When true, living creatures may be stored with movement damage rules.

livingCreatureMovementDamage.description: Damage formula applied when a stored living creature moves inside the caster.

casterAlignmentRestrictions.description: Alignment gates on who may cast the spell (e.g. Embodiment barred to good alignments).

blocksIfUnmet.description: When true (default), the client blocks cast until alignment is confirmed; when false, show a visible warning only.

targetConditionGroup.description: One bundle of acceptable target states (e.g. sedated OR restrained).

label.description: UI label for this bundle (e.g. Placid, Willing consent).

match.description: `any` — one listed state is enough; `all` — every listed state must be true.

castingTargetPreconditions.description: Structured casting gates on target state — Fleshsculptor surgery requires the subject be placid (sedated or restrained) or willing. Surfaces in creation/combat UI instead of burying consent rules in `limitations` prose.

summary.description: Player-facing precondition reminder (e.g. Target must be placid or willing).

satisfy.description: `any_group` (default) — at least one group must pass; `all_groups` — every group must pass.

blocksIfUnmet.description: When true (default), the client blocks cast until preconditions are confirmed; when false, show a visible warning only (Total GM Agency override).

temporalInterval.description: Named time span for effect duration clocks and upkeep cycles.

durationValue.description: Fixed amount or dice formula (e.g. `1D6`) for the interval length.

perLevel.description: Scaling prose when the interval grows with caster level.

resourceCost.description: Structured spend of P.P.E., I.S.P., or another pool.

formula.description: Dice or scaling formula when a fixed `amount` is insufficient.

upkeepFailureState.description: Mechanical or narrative consequence when upkeep is not paid before the effect expires.

summary.description: Short outcome label (e.g. Fatal gangrene, Limb rejection).

damage.description: Direct damage formula applied on failure (if any).

catastrophic.description: When true, failure is typically lethal or irreversible without intervention.

effectUpkeep.description: Periodic maintenance that sustains or renews a timed biological or enchanted effect (e.g. pump P.P.E. into a Fleshsculptor graft before it expires).

timing.description: `before_expiry` — pay to reset the parent duration clock; `on_expiry` — roll consequence if unpaid at expiry; `each_interval` — recurring tick.

resetsDuration.description: When true, paying upkeep resets the parent `duration` to its initial span.

permanentPoolReduction.description: Irreversible reduction applied to a maximum pool or attribute.

value.description: Fixed amount subtracted from the maximum when `kind` is `fixed`.

formula.description: Palladium dice or attribute formula when `kind` is `formula` (e.g. `2D6`, `PE`).

permanentCostEntry.description: One irreversible maximum-pool or attribute sacrifice (distinct from activation `ppe` / `isp` spend). When `trigger` is omitted, engines default to `on_success` for backward compatibility.

resource.description: Maximum pool or attribute permanently reduced.

trigger.description: `on_cast` — sacrifice is applied when the feature is invoked regardless of outcome (e.g. Close Rift drains 2 P.P.E. even on failure); `on_success` — sacrifice applies only after successful resolution (default when omitted).

spawnedPresenceConstructStatModifiers.description: Physical attributes of a spawned construct (e.g. Ectoplasm entity P.S., P.P., Spd.).

spawnedPresenceConstructMovement.description: Movement capabilities of a spawned construct.

spawnedPresenceConstructCombatModifiers.description: Flat integer strike/parry/dodge penalties or bonuses specific to the construct.

spawnedPresenceConstruct.description: Targetable magical construct with its own ablative health pool, distinct from catalog creatures.

name.description: Construct label (e.g. Magic Net, Energy Field).

derivedHealth.description: Construct S.D.C. pool formula (e.g. `60 S.D.C.`, `20 S.D.C. per level of experience`).

notes.description: Behavior or lore not captured in catalog stats (e.g. alien intelligence, loyalty rules).

spawnedPresenceCreatureControl.description: Control or obedience save for a summoned creature (catalog or categorical).

spawnedPresenceCreatureDuration.description: How long summoned creatures remain under the caster's influence.

spawnedPresencePreservedTissue.description: Preserved severed head, organ, or limb animated as a distinct presence (Living Hell pattern). Distinct from catalog creature summons.

hpFormula.description: Remaining hit points formula (e.g. donor P.E. at time of severing).

consciousnessRetained.description: When true, the tissue remains awake and aware.

speechLimited.description: When true, speech is impaired (e.g. no lungs for a severed head).

requiresNoRot.description: When true, the tissue must be free of decay to remain viable.

incompatibleReattachmentSpellIds.description: Spell ids that cannot reattach this tissue (e.g. permanent Living Hell vs Meld).

ppeHarvestAtDeath.description: P.P.E. recovered from the victim when the preserved tissue dies.

spawnedPresenceCreature.description: Creature summoning — either a fixed catalog race (full stat block from `catalogRaceId`) or a categorical/variable summon resolved when the caster chooses a valid bestiary entry at cast time.

catalogRaceId.description: Canonical race id from `content/races/<genre>/{npc,gm_approval,creatures}.json` — loads the full stat block (e.g. `race_waste_coyote`).

summonTemplateId.description: Lightweight summon template when no single catalog race row applies yet (e.g. `template_minor_astral_being`).

entityCategory.description: Machine-filterable summon pool slug — engine queries the bestiary for valid `catalogRaceId` rows tagged with this category at cast time (e.g. `astral_being_minor`, `dream_entity_minor`).

label.description: Player-facing prose when the summon pool is open-ended and no catalog row or template exists yet (e.g. `Any minor astral being`).

countFormula.description: Dice or scaling formula for how many creatures appear (e.g. `1D6`).

notes.description: Summoned creature behavior not implied by the catalog race or category (e.g. permanent loyalty, command wording).

spawnedPresence.description: Physical construct, catalog creature, or preserved tissue spawned by a spell or power.

formTransformation.description: Full or partial character sheet replacement while the feature is active (distinct from `grantedModifiers` overlay buffs).

mode.description: `sheet_replacement` swaps the active stat block; `facade_overlay` applies only when casting from Facade; `host_embodiment` wears an incapacitated host body (Embodiment).

targetCatalogRaceId.description: Bestiary or race row whose stat block replaces the caster's form.

targetTemplateId.description: Lightweight transformation template when no single catalog race applies (e.g. Mist form).

masksCharacterSheet.description: When true, the original sheet is hidden behind the transformed form until the effect ends.

preservedAspects.description: Caster aspects that persist through transformation (e.g. mind, alignment, ppe_pool).

hostMustBeComatose.description: When true, the host must be comatose or otherwise incapacitated before embodiment (Embodiment).

hostMinimumSize.description: Host body size or species constraint relative to the caster.

hostDiesOnCast.description: When true, the host's original consciousness dies when the caster embodies them.

shedDurationMeleeRounds.description: Melee rounds required to shed the host body and return to the caster's natural form.
